title: refactor: merge account:balance scope into account:usage
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Tidying the Hive's Ledger
gist.blurb: We've merged the balance and usage API scopes into a single, unified permission. Less clutter in the UI, simpler key management for everyone.
gist.summary: Merged the account:balance and account:usage API scopes into a single account:usage permission to simplify key management.
gist.impact: Developers will see a cleaner consent UI with a single 'Usage' row instead of two separate permissions for account-wide aggregates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing two separate ledgers or folders into a single unified file, representing the merging of the two API scopes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing two glowing folders into a single lime green (#ecf874) filing cabinet. A retro terminal nearby displays clean code. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
